SEARCH
Package io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack

Class FoodBuilder

java.lang.Object
io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.FoodBuilder
public class FoodBuilder extends Object
A builder class for customizing food properties in an ItemStack.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final record 
    FoodBuilder.FoodPojo
    Represents a food effect that includes a potion effect and its probability.

    Constructor
    Description

    Constructs a FoodBuilder with a given ItemStack.

    Description

    addFoodEffect(org.bukkit.potion.PotionEffectType effectType, int durationInSecond, int level, boolean enableParticles, boolean ambient, boolean icon, float chanceInPercent)

    canAlwaysEat()
    Checks if the food item can always be eaten, even when the player is not hungry.
    FoodBuilder

    Sets the item that remains after the food is consumed.

    Clears all custom food properties from the ItemStack.

    Clears all food effects from the item.

  • Constructor Details

    • FoodBuilder

      public FoodBuilder(@NotNull @NotNull org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack itemstack)
      Constructs a FoodBuilder with a given ItemStack.
      Parameters:
      itemstack - The ItemStack to modify.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the itemstack is null.
      IllegalArgumentException - if the itemstack is AIR.

  • Method Details

    • setFoodSound

      public FoodBuilder setFoodSound(org.bukkit.Sound sound)
      Sets the sound played when the food is consumed.
      Parameters:
      sound - The sound to play.
      Returns:
      The current FoodBuilder instance.

    • setFoodAnimation

      public FoodBuilder setFoodAnimation(String animation)
      Sets the animation displayed when consuming the food.
      Parameters:
      animation - The animation type.
      Returns:
      The current FoodBuilder instance.

    • setFoodConsumeParticles

      public FoodBuilder setFoodConsumeParticles(boolean value)
      Enables or disables particles shown when consuming the food.
      Parameters:
      value - True to show particles, false otherwise.
      Returns:
      The current FoodBuilder instance.

    • foodClear

      public FoodBuilder foodClear()
      Clears all custom food properties from the ItemStack.
      Returns:
      The current FoodBuilder instance.

    • setFoodCanAlwaysEat

      public FoodBuilder setFoodCanAlwaysEat(boolean value)
      Sets whether the food can be eaten even if the player is not hungry.
      Parameters:
      value - True to allow always eating, false otherwise.
      Returns:
      The current FoodBuilder instance.

    • setFoodEffects

      public FoodBuilder setFoodEffects(List<FoodBuilder.FoodPojo> value)
      Sets the list of potion effects applied when the food is consumed.
      Parameters:
      value - A list of FoodPojo representing the effects.
      Returns:
      The current FoodBuilder instance.

    • getFoodEffects

      public List<FoodBuilder.FoodPojo> getFoodEffects()
      Gets the list of FoodPojo effects applied when the food is consumed.
      Returns:
      A list of FoodPojo representing the effects.

    • getAnimation

      public String getAnimation(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item)
      Retrieves the animation type of the food when consumed.
      Parameters:
      item - The ItemStack to check.
      Returns:
      The animation type as a string.

    • getSound

      public org.bukkit.Sound getSound(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item)
      Retrieves the sound that plays when the food is consumed.
      Parameters:
      item - The ItemStack to check.
      Returns:
      The corresponding Sound.

    • hasConsumeParticles

      public boolean hasConsumeParticles(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item)
      Checks if the food has consumed particles enabled.
      Parameters:
      item - The ItemStack to check.
      Returns:
      True if consume particles are enabled, false otherwise.

    • getSaturation

      public float getSaturation(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item)
      Retrieves the saturation value of the food.
      Parameters:
      item - The ItemStack to check.
      Returns:
      The saturation value.

    • getNutrition

      public int getNutrition(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item)
      Retrieves the nutrition value of the food.
      Parameters:
      item - The ItemStack to check.
      Returns:
      The nutrition value.

    • setUseRemainder

      public FoodBuilder setUseRemainder(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack d)
      Sets the use remainder of the food (item that remains after consumption).
      Parameters:
      d - The ItemStack to set as the remainder.
      Returns:
      The current FoodBuilder instance.

    • getUseRemainder

      public org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack getUseRemainder()
      Retrieves the use remainder of the food (item that remains after consumption).
      Returns:
      The ItemStack that remains after consumption.

    • canAlwaysEat

      public boolean canAlwaysEat()
      Checks if the food item can always be eaten, even when the player is not hungry.
      Returns:
      true if the item can always be eaten, false otherwise.

    • foodEatTicks

      public FoodBuilder foodEatTicks(float value)
      Sets the time it takes to eat the food in seconds.
      Parameters:
      value - The time in ticks (20 ticks = 1 second).
      Returns:
      The current FoodBuilder instance for chaining.

    • getEatSeconds

      public float getEatSeconds(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack stack)
      Gets the time it takes to eat the food in seconds.
      Parameters:
      stack - The ItemStack to check.
      Returns:
      The time in seconds.

    • setFoodNutrition

      public FoodBuilder setFoodNutrition(int value)
      Sets the nutrition value (hunger points) of the food.
      Parameters:
      value - The nutrition value.
      Returns:
      The current FoodBuilder instance for chaining.

    • getNutrition

      public int getNutrition()
      Gets the nutrition value of the food.
      Returns:
      The nutrition value, or 0 if not set.

    • setFoodSaturation

      public FoodBuilder setFoodSaturation(float value)
      Sets the saturation value of the food.
      Parameters:
      value - The saturation value.
      Returns:
      The current FoodBuilder instance for chaining.

    • getSaturation

      public float getSaturation()
      Gets the saturation value of the food.
      Returns:
      The saturation value, or 0 if not set.

    • addFoodEffect

      public FoodBuilder addFoodEffect(org.bukkit.potion.PotionEffectType effectType, int durationInSecond, int level, boolean enableParticles, boolean ambient, boolean icon, float chanceInPercent)
      Adds a food effect (PotionEffect) with a given chance to apply.
      Parameters:
      effectType - The type of potion effect.
      durationInSecond - The duration in ticks.
      level - The level of the effect.
      enableParticles - Whether particles are shown.
      ambient - Whether the effect is ambient.
      icon - Whether the effect icon is shown.
      chanceInPercent - The chance for the effect to apply.
      Returns:
      The current FoodBuilder instance for chaining.

    • removeFoodEffect

      public FoodBuilder removeFoodEffect(org.bukkit.potion.PotionEffectType effectType, @Nullable @Nullable Integer level)
      Removes a specific food effect.
      Parameters:
      effectType - The type of potion effect to remove.
      level - The level of the effect, or null to remove any level.
      Returns:
      The current FoodBuilder instance for chaining.

    • foodClearEffects

      public FoodBuilder foodClearEffects()
      Clears all food effects from the item.
      Returns:
      The current FoodBuilder instance for chaining.

    • convertFoodTo

      public FoodBuilder convertFoodTo(@NotNull @NotNull org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack target, int amount)
      Sets the item that remains after the food is consumed.
      Parameters:
      target - The resulting ItemStack.
      amount - The amount of the resulting item.
      Returns:
      The current FoodBuilder instance for chaining.
